title: Harvest Moon Diner
overview: A small-town cook reopens her late mother's diner and church-cachecovers her family.

title: Letters We Never Sent
overview: Decades of unsent letters reunite two former lovers in a coastal town.

title: Steel Magnolias
overview: Six Southern women find their bond tested and strengthened by the events that shape their lives in a small Louisiana town.

title: Dolly Parton: Here I Am
overview: A documentary chronicling the extraordinary life and career of country music legend Dolly Parton.

title: 9 to 5
overview: Three female office workers plot against their tyrannical, sexist boss — with hilarious results.

title: Sweet Home Alabama
overview: A New York fashion designer returns to her Alabama hometown when she needs her childhood sweetheart to sign divorce papers.

title: Fried Green Tomatoes
overview: A housewife is enchanted by a tale of two women who forged an unlikely friendship at a Depression-era Alabama cafe.

title: The Help
overview: An aspiring author in 1960s Mississippi interviews Black maids about their lives and experiences, challenging the social order.

title: Coal Miner's Daughter
overview: The true story of country music legend Loretta Lynn, from her humble Appalachian beginnings to stardom.

title: Dolly Parton's Coat of Many Colors
overview: Based on Dolly Parton's childhood, a young girl faces bullying but finds strength in her family's love.

title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding
overview: A Greek-American woman falls in love with a non-Greek man and must bring him around to meeting and marrying him in the midst of a rambunctious family.

title: Driving Miss Daisy
overview: An old Jewish woman in Atlanta and her Black chauffeur develop a profound friendship over the course of 25 years.

title: A Walk to Remember
overview: A bad boy falls in love with a quiet, religious girl who is diagnosed with a terminal illness.

title: Dolly Parton's Christmas on the Square
overview: A rich, cold-hearted woman returns to her hometown to sell the land and evict everyone before Christmas.

title: Places in the Heart
overview: A young widow strives to keep her farm and family together during the Great Depression in Texas.

title: Beaches
overview: A rich debutante and a poor entertainer meet as children and form a lifetime friendship despite their differences.

title: Tender Mercies
overview: A washed-up country music star finds redemption through a widow and her son in rural Texas.

title: Dolly Parton's Mountain Magic Christmas
overview: Dolly Parton heads home to the Smoky Mountains to film a holiday special with a collection of celebrity friends.

title: Crimes of the Heart
overview: Three eccentric Southern sisters reunite when their youngest sister shoots her abusive husband.

title: Magnolia Pines: The Movie
overview: The Beaumont family reunites in their Blue Ridge hometown after their grandmother's announcement brings decades of secrets to light.

title: Miss Firecracker
overview: A young woman in small-town Mississippi obsessively prepares to enter a local beauty pageant to redeem her family's reputation.

title: Good Ol Boys
overview: A widowed cattle farmer in rural North Carolina fights to keep his land against a corporate developer while raising his teenage granddaughter.
